contacts.error--add-contact: Unable to add contact. Please check your Internet connection.
contacts.error--add-contact-exists-already: Could not create contact, please try again
contacts.error--add-contact-threema-id-already-ad: This {shortAppName} ID is already part of your contact list.
contacts.error--add-contact-threema-id-is-own: You cannot add your own {shortAppName} ID as a contact. Tip: For personal notes, you can create a group chat with you as the only member.
contacts.error--add-contact-threema-id-not-found: This {shortAppName} ID could not be found or has been revoked.
contacts.error--add-contact-threema-id-unable-to-: Couldn’t check if contact is valid. Is your device connected to the Internet?
contacts.hint--badge-work: This contact uses the business version {fullAppName}.

contacts.prose--add-contact-instructions-work-dir: Alternatively, search a contact in the company directory, and add it to your contact list:

dialog--auto-app-update-prompt.prose--description-p2-macos: If prompted, please approve installing the helper tool. This is required for automatic updates to work properly.
dialog--auto-app-update-prompt.prose--description-p2-other-os: After the download is complete, the application will restart automatically. This can take a couple of minutes.
dialog--auto-app-update-prompt.prose--description-p3: If the automatic update fails, please download and install the update manually:

dialog--change-password.error--new-password-must-be-different: The new password must be different from the old one
dialog--change-password.error--password-length: Please enter at least {n, plural, =1 {1 character} other {# characters}}
dialog--change-password.prose--intro: The password protects your messages, {shortAppName} ID, and other data on this computer. You have to enter it when opening {shortAppName} for desktop. Please note that there is no way to recover this password. If you forget it, you will have to link this device again.

dialog--change-password-confirmation.prose--description: Please ensure you have this password on hand. It cannot be reset if you forget it. You can opt to save your password when you log back in.
dialog--change-password-confirmation.prose--intro: {shortAppName} for Desktop must be re-launched to save your changes.
dialog--change-password-confirmation.prose--note: Please note: You will need to re-authenticate with your new password.

dialog--clear-logs.prose--description-disable: The following files will be cleared irrevocably:

dialog--close-poll.prose--close-poll: If you close the poll, the results will become available, and voting is no longer possible.

dialog--copy-poll.prose--copy-polls-empty: No polls have been created yet.

dialog--create-poll-message.prose--copy-existing-condition: Only available if the fields below are still empty

dialog--d2d-protocol-version-incompatibl.error--no-connection: Failed to unlink the device. Please check your internet connection and try again.
dialog--d2d-protocol-version-incompatibl.label--title: Incompatbile App Version on your Mobile Device
dialog--d2d-protocol-version-incompatibl.prose--description-p1: The {shortAppName} version installed on your mobile device is not compatible with this version of {shortAppName} for desktop. To avoid synchronization problems, please update the app on your mobile device and relink it with {shortAppName} for desktop.
dialog--d2d-protocol-version-incompatibl.prose--description-p2: The message history can be restored after relinking.

dialog--delete-conversation.prose--contact-conversation-prompt: This will delete the chat with {name} and its messages on this device (but not on your other devices).
dialog--delete-conversation.prose--distribution-list-conversation-pr: This will delete this distribution list and its messages on this device (but not on your other devices).
dialog--delete-conversation.prose--group-conversation-member: However, you will stay a member of this group.
dialog--delete-conversation.prose--group-conversation-prompt: This will delete the group chat "{name}" and its messages on this device (but not on your other devices).

dialog--delete-message.prose--delete-message: Do you really want to delete this message?
dialog--delete-message.prose--delete-not-supported-partial: Note: If you select "{buttonText}", this message will not be deleted for the following group members: {names}{n, plural, =0 {.} other { and {n} others.}} To support deleted messages, they need to install the latest {shortAppName} version.

dialog--delete-profile.prose--description: This {shortAppName} ID and the corresponding data will be removed from this device (but not on your other devices).
dialog--delete-profile.prose--failed: Something went wrong when deleting your data on this device. Please check your connection and try again.

dialog--device-cookie-mismatch.error--no-connection: Failed to unlink the device. Please check your internet connection and try again.
dialog--device-cookie-mismatch.prose--description-p1: The server has detected a connection from a different device with the same {shortAppName} ID. If you haven’t recently used your {shortAppName} ID on another device, please contact our support and send us the log file if possible.
dialog--device-cookie-mismatch.prose--description-p2: If you have used your {shortAppName} ID on another device, we recommend relinking the desktop app with your mobile device. The message history can be restored after relinking.

dialog--device-cookie-missing.error--no-connection: Failed to unlink the device. Please check your internet connection and try again.
dialog--device-cookie-missing.prose--description: To improve multi-device security, it is necessary to relink this device. Your message history will be restored after relinking.

dialog--edit-device-name.error--device-name-empty: Device name must not be empty

dialog--empty-conversation.prose--contact-conversation-prompt: This will delete all messages including all media and documents in this chat with "{name}" on this device (but not on your other devices).
dialog--empty-conversation.prose--distribution-list-conversation-pr: This will delete all messages including all media and documents in the "{name}" distribution list on this device (but not on your other devices).
dialog--empty-conversation.prose--group-conversation-prompt: This will delete all messages including all media and documents in the "{name}" group chat on this device (but not on your other devices).

dialog--error-connection.markup--backup: The message history will be restored after relinking.
dialog--error-connection.markup--client-update-required-p1: This {shortAppName} version is no longer supported (outdated protocol version).
dialog--error-connection.markup--client-update-required-p2: Please <slot_1>update to the latest version</slot_1> to continue using {shortAppName}.
dialog--error-connection.markup--client-was-dropped-p1: This device has been unlinked, which is why you currently can’t send or receive new messages.
dialog--error-connection.markup--client-was-dropped-p2: If unlinking was not triggered by you, please note that this might happen during the beta phase for technical reasons. We apologize for the inconvenience.
dialog--error-connection.markup--device-slot-mismatch-p1: Due to an unexpected error, this device must be re-linked with the server.
dialog--error-connection.prose--mediator-update-required-p1: This {shortAppName} version is not compatible with your mediator server. The server uses an outdated protocol version and must be updated first.

dialog--forgot-password.prose--step-1-description-p1: For security reasons, there is no way to recover a lost password for the desktop app. To keep using {shortAppName} for desktop, you need to relink it with your mobile device. Click “Next” for the relink instructions.
dialog--forgot-password.prose--step-2-description-p1: To relink your device, follow these steps:
dialog--forgot-password.prose--step-2-description-p2: Please note: The messages on this device will be lost when relinking (but not on your other devices).
dialog--forgot-password.prose--step-2-list-step-1: On your phone, remove this device in “Settings > {shortAppName} 2.0 for Desktop (Beta)”
dialog--forgot-password.prose--step-2-list-step-2: Select the “Relink Device” button below to start the linking process

dialog--id-information.prose--threema-id-description-p1: When starting the app for the first time, each {shortAppName} user gets a randomly generated 8-digit {shortAppName} ID. This ID is your unique address in {shortAppName} and makes it possible to use {shortAppName} completely anonymously, i.e., without having to disclose any personal information.
dialog--id-information.prose--threema-id-description-p2: Your {shortAppName} ID is just one of two components that make up your identity in {shortAppName}. The other one is the so-called key pair (consisting of a public key and a private key) which is essential for the encryption. Your {shortAppName} ID is permanently tied to your public key. While the public key is sent to {shortAppName}’s servers to be distributed to your chat partners, the private key remains on your device, where it is securely stored. All messages directed to you will be individually encrypted with your public key on the sender’s device and can only be decrypted with your personal private key.

dialog--invalid-work-credentials.error--incorrect-password: The entered password is incorrect. Please try again.
dialog--invalid-work-credentials.error--unlinking-failed: Could not unlink this device. Please check your Internet connection and try again.
dialog--invalid-work-credentials.error--validation-failed: Validation of {fullAppName} credentials failed. Please check your Internet connection and try again.
dialog--invalid-work-credentials.prose--credentials-valid: Credentials are valid! Please enter your app password to save the updated credentials:
dialog--invalid-work-credentials.prose--description-enter-credentials: Please enter valid {fullAppName} credentials. If you don’t know the credentials, please contact your {fullAppName} administrator.
dialog--invalid-work-credentials.prose--description-p1: The credentials for {fullAppName} are invalid. Either they were disabled by your {fullAppName} admin, or your {fullAppName} license expired.
dialog--invalid-work-credentials.prose--description-p2: To continue using {fullAppName} for desktop, you have two options:
dialog--invalid-work-credentials.prose--description-relink: Remove the current link, and relink {fullAppName} for desktop to your mobile device. The message history will be restored after relinking.

dialog--linking-confirm-emoji.label--title: Confirm images on your mobile device.

dialog--linking-error.label--message-connection-error-timeout: Due to inactivity, the linking process was terminated. Please start the process again.
dialog--linking-error.label--message-rendezvous-error-timeout: Due to inactivity, the linking process was terminated. Please start the process again.
dialog--linking-error.label--message-restore-error: There was an error restoring the transferred data. Please try again.
dialog--linking-error.prose--configuration-failed: The setup of the OnPrem instance failed because of a configuration error. Please retry the setup process or contact your administrator.
dialog--linking-error.prose--message-connection-error-generic: Connection to the server was lost before linking was complete. If you did not abort the process yourself, please check your Internet connection, and try again.
dialog--linking-error.prose--message-connection-error-protocol: Connection to the server was lost before linking was complete. Please try again.
dialog--linking-error.prose--message-generic: An error occurred during linking. Please try again.
dialog--linking-error.prose--message-invalid-identity: The {shortAppName} ID used for linking is unknown to the server or has been revoked.
dialog--linking-error.prose--message-invalid-work-credentials: The credentials for {fullAppName} are invalid or expired. Please restart the app on your mobile device and retry linking, or contact your {fullAppName} administrator.
dialog--linking-error.prose--message-wrong-app-variant-consume: It is not possible to link your {shortAppName} ID with this app. If you use {fullAppName} on your mobile device, download the desktop app from <slot_1 />.
dialog--linking-error.prose--message-wrong-app-variant-custom-: It is not possible to link your {shortAppName} ID with this app.
dialog--linking-error.prose--message-wrong-app-variant-work-er: It is not possible to link your {shortAppName} ID with this app. If you use the consumer version of {shortAppName} on your mobile device, download the desktop app from <slot_1 />.
dialog--linking-error.prose--restoration-failed: Restoring existing messages failed. Please try again or relink without restoring your existing messages.

dialog--linking-old-profile-password.error--incorrect-password: The entered password is incorrect. Please try again.
dialog--linking-old-profile-password.prose--intro: Previous chats were found. To restore them, please enter the corresponding password. If you skip this step, the old chats will be deleted irrevocably.

dialog--linking-oppf.error--credentials-error: The provided credentials are incorrect. Please check that the combination of URL and work credentials is correct or contact your administrator.
dialog--linking-oppf.error--fetch-error: The provided URL is invalid. Please check that the combination of URL and work credentials is correct or contact your administrator.
dialog--linking-oppf.error--fetch-error-connection: The provided URL is not accessible. Please check your network connection or contact your administrator.
dialog--linking-oppf.prose--enter-config: {fullAppName} is the self-hosted secure messenger for companies. Please enter the credentials provided by your company.
dialog--linking-oppf.prose--forget-credentials: Forgot your credentials? Please contact your {fullAppName} administrator.
dialog--linking-oppf.prose--private-user: If you are a private user, please visit <slot_1 /> to download {shortAppName}.

dialog--linking-restoration-identity-mis.prose--intro: A different {shortAppName} ID was previously used on this device. Your chat history cannot be restored.

dialog--linking-scan.markup--intro-s1: This beta version can be used in connection with the {mobileAppName} mobile app. Please note that some features are not yet available.
dialog--linking-scan.markup--step-1: Open the {mobileAppName} app on your mobile device
dialog--linking-scan.markup--step-2-android: In the Android app, go to the main menu, select “<slot_1>{shortAppName} 2.0 for desktop (beta)</slot_1>,” and tap “<slot_1>Add device</slot_1>”
dialog--linking-scan.markup--step-2-ios: In the iOS app, go to “<slot_1>Settings</slot_1> > <slot_1>{shortAppName} 2.0 for Desktop (Beta)</slot_1>,” and tap “<slot_1>Add Device</slot_1>”

dialog--linking-set-password.error--password-length: Please enter at least {n, plural, =1 {1 character} other {# characters}}
dialog--linking-set-password.prose---save-password-hint-false: You will need to enter your password each time you open the Desktop app.
dialog--linking-set-password.prose--intro: The password will protect your messages, {shortAppName} ID, and other data on this computer. You have to enter it when starting the desktop app.
dialog--linking-set-password.prose--save-password--hint-true: You will be logged in automatically when you open the Desktop app.
dialog--linking-set-password.prose--save-password-tooltip: Your password is stored using your system's default secure credential storage.
dialog--linking-set-password.prose--save-password-tooltip-unavailable: {shortAppName} for Desktop could not detect a default secure credential storage on your device.

dialog--linking-success.markup--description: {mobileAppName} can now be used on this computer <slot_1 />(even when your mobile device is turned off or isn’t connected to the Internet).

dialog--manual-app-update.markup--linux-p1: Please install the update through your system package manager or by running <slot_1>flatpak update</slot_1> in your terminal.
dialog--manual-app-update.markup--linux-p2: For more information about this update, see <slot_1 />.
dialog--manual-app-update.markup--macos-p1: Please update by downloading and installing the latest release from <slot_1 />.
dialog--manual-app-update.markup--windows-p1: Please update by downloading and installing the latest release from <slot_1 />.

dialog--missing-work-credentials.prose--description: No {fullAppName} credentials could be found. To continue using the desktop app, you need to relink this device. Your message history will be restored after relinking.

dialog--relink-profile.prose--description-p1: This device will be unlinked, and the application will restart.
dialog--relink-profile.prose--description-p2: Your messages will be kept if you relink with the same {shortAppName} ID as before.
dialog--relink-profile.prose--failed: Something went wrong when relinking your profile. Please check your connection and try again

dialog--server-alert.error--another-device-p1: The server has detected a connection from a different device with the same {shortAppName} ID.
dialog--server-alert.error--another-device-p2: If you haven't used your {shortAppName} ID on another device or with an older app version in the meantime, please contact the support and send a log file if possible.
dialog--server-alert.error--another-device-p3: Otherwise, we recommend that you relink {shortAppName} Desktop. Your message history will be kept.
dialog--server-alert.error--no-connection: Failed to unlink the device. Please check your internet connection and try again.

dialog--startup-unlock.error--incorrect-password: The entered password is incorrect. Please try again.
dialog--startup-unlock.prose--save-password-tooltip: Your password is stored using your system's default secure credential storage.
dialog--startup-unlock.prose--save-password-tooltip-unavailable: {shortAppName} for Desktop could not detect a default secure credential storage on your device.

dialog--toggle-logger.prose--description-disable: This will turn off logging. The following files will be emptied irrevocably:
dialog--toggle-logger.prose--description-enable: The events will be logged to the following files:
dialog--toggle-logger.prose--warning-disable: Turning off the logger will trigger a restart of the application.
dialog--toggle-logger.prose--warning-enable: Turning on the logger will trigger a restart of the application.

dialog--toggle-spellcheck.prose--warning-disable: Turning off the spellcheck will trigger a restart of the application.
dialog--toggle-spellcheck.prose--warning-enable: Turning on the spellcheck will trigger a restart of the application.

dialog--unrecoverable-state.prose--description-p1: We have detected that your local data is in an unrecoverable state. To prevent data loss, you currently can’t send or receive new messages. We apologize for the inconvenience.
dialog--unrecoverable-state.prose--description-p2: To continue using {shortAppName}, you need to relink the device. The message history can be restored after relinking.
dialog--unrecoverable-state.prose--description-p3: Please report this error to {shortAppName}’s support from the app on your mobile device (“Settings > Beta Feedback”). Note: Remember to save your logs before relinking, as they will be cleared.

dialog--unsupported-feature-protected-co.prose--description: Private chats are not yet supported in {appName}.

dialog--verification-levels.prose--intro: The dots are an indicator for a contact’s verification level.
dialog--verification-levels.prose--level-fully-verified-default: You have personally verified the ID and public key of the person by scanning their QR code. Assuming their device has not been hijacked, you can be very sure that messages from this contact were really written by the person that they indicate.
dialog--verification-levels.prose--level-fully-verified-work: This verification level is only available in {fullAppName}; it indicates that the {shortAppName} ID belongs to an internal contact whose ID and public key you have verified by scanning their QR code.
dialog--verification-levels.prose--level-server-verified-default: The ID has been matched with a contact in your address book (by phone number or email). Since the server verifies phone numbers and email addresses, you can be reasonably sure that the person is who they claim to be.
dialog--verification-levels.prose--level-server-verified-work: This verification level is only available in {fullAppName}; it indicates that the {shortAppName} ID belongs to an internal company contact.
dialog--verification-levels.prose--level-unverified: The ID and public key have been obtained from the server because you received a message from this contact for the first time or added the ID manually. No matching contact was found in your address book (by phone number or email), and therefore you cannot be sure that the person is who they claim to be in their messages.

emoji-picker.error--emoji-picker-preferences: Emoji picker preferences could not be loaded

groups.error--group-edit-not-creator: You cannot edit the group because you are not the creator

groups.label--group-members-count-long: {n, plural, =0 {No Group Members} =1 {1 Group Member} other {# Group Members}}
groups.prose--delete: If you delete the group, the group chat and its content will be permanently deleted.
groups.prose--disband: If you dissolve the group, it can no longer be used or managed by anyone.
groups.prose--disband-and-delete: Deleting this group chat will remove all messages, media, and documents from this device and your linked devices.
groups.prose--leave: If you leave the group, you can no longer participate in the conversation.

messaging.error--call-group-full: Maximum reached: No more participants can join this group call
messaging.error--call-group-left-kicked-or-removed: Group call ended because you left the group
messaging.error--call-unexpected-error: Call ended due to an unexpected error

messaging.error--contact-invalid: You cannot send a message to this contact because it is invalid.

messaging.error--copy-message-image: Could not copy image to clipboard
messaging.error--copy-message-link: Could not copy link to clipboard
messaging.error--copy-message-selection: Could not copy selection to clipboard

messaging.error--file-permanent-download-error: Data could not be downloaded, the download expired.
messaging.error--file-storage-read-error: Could not read data from file storage.
messaging.error--file-storage-write-error: Downloaded data could not be stored in file storage. Do you have enough free disk space?
messaging.error--file-temporary-download-error: Download failed. Please check your Internet connection and try again.
messaging.error--group-membership: You are no longer part of this group.
messaging.error--quoted-message-not-found: The quoted message could not be found
messaging.error--reaction-unsupported-emoji: Could not react to message using an unsupported emoji
messaging.error--reaction-withdrawal-disallowed: The recipient does not yet support removing emoji reactions. You can still replace 👍 with 👎 or vice versa.
messaging.markup--chat-empty-state: This chat is linked with your mobile device. <slot_1 />All future messages will appear here.
messaging.prose--edit-not-supported: Cannot edit the message because the recipient’s app version does not support this feature.
messaging.prose--edit-not-supported-group: Cannot edit the message because no group member supports this feature.
messaging.prose--edit-not-supported-partial: The following group members will not be able to see your edits: {names}{n, plural, =0 {.} other { and {n} others.}} To see edits, they need to install the latest {shortAppName} version.
messaging.prose--emoji-reaction-not-supported: Cannot add an emoji reaction to the message because the recipient’s app version does not support this feature.
messaging.prose--emoji-reaction-not-supported-grou: Cannot add an emoji reaction to the message because no group member supports this feature.
messaging.prose--emoji-reaction-not-supported-part: The following group members will not be able to see your reactions: {names}{n, plural, =0 {.} other { and {n} more.}} To see reactions, they need to install the latest {shortAppName} version.
messaging.prose--notification-group-call-start-bod: A group call was started by {name}

messaging.prose--notification-title-single: {n, plural, =0 {New message} =1 {New message} other {{n} new messages}} from {recipientName}
messaging.prose--paste-image-in-edit: It’s not possible to paste a file when editing a message.

settings.prose--do-not-disturb-mentioned-on: You will only receive notifications when you are mentioned

settings--about.prose--third-party-code: <slot_1 /> contains code from open source libraries. Please check out the file <slot_2 /> for detailed license information.

settings--chat.label--on-enter-submit: Enter key sends the message. Use “Shift + Enter” to add a new line.

settings--media.prose--play-gifs: Automatically play GIFs if smaller than 5 MB

settings--profile.label--profile-picture-visibility: Who can see your profile picture?
